name: Qryn
description: Polyglot observability stack on ClickHouse providing drop-in replacements for Loki, Prometheus, Tempo and Datadog APIs.

seo.title: Qryn — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Qryn: Polyglot observability stack on ClickHouse providing drop-in replacements for Loki, Prometheus, Tempo and Datadog APIs.

when_to_use: Drop-in Loki, Prometheus, and Tempo on ClickHouse
Datadog-compatible API with open-source stack costs
Unified polyglot observability with one storage backend
Cost-efficient log storage with ClickHouse compression

pros: ClickHouse backend supports Loki, Prom, Tempo, DD APIs
Single storage across telemetry types cuts costs
No vendor lock-in via standard APIs
cons: ClickHouse ops skills needed for self-hosting
Managed service less mature than Grafana Cloud
Query tuning can surprise Prometheus veterans
review.verdict: Ambitious polyglot observability on ClickHouse; great for cost savings if you can operate it.
review.best_for: Teams wanting unified ClickHouse storage for LGTM stack without Grafana Cloud bills.
review.not_for: Teams without ClickHouse expertise or wanting turnkey hosted experience.
